# PERF-069 positive: c.Writer.Write called without c.Writer.Flush()
lang: go
file: PERF-069-vulnerable.go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

func StreamNoFlush(c *gin.Context) {
	chunk := []byte("hello world\n")
	for i := 0; i < 10; i++ {
		c.Writer.Write(chunk)
	}
	_ = http.StatusOK
}
